relationships.Mira: childhood friend, now the town healer; trusts her completely
relationships.Lord Vane: distrusts him, believes the lord overtaxes the common folk
relationships.Captain Rowan: respects his discipline, but worries the guard is compromised

extra.location: The Iron Hearth forge, market district
extra.secret: Once forged a blade for an assassin unknowingly; haunted by it

relationships.Aldric: old friend from childhood; worries he works too hard
relationships.Talia: treats travelers from the inn and trusts her judgment
relationships.Nyx: patches her wounds and asks too few questions

extra.secret: Secretly studies forbidden necromantic texts to understand death better

relationships.Aldric: views as a useful commoner, knows he is distrusted
relationships.Captain Rowan: publicly praises him, privately monitors his loyalty
relationships.Nyx: wants her silenced before she sells the wrong secret

extra.secret: Siphons tax revenue to fund a private mercenary army

relationships.Lord Vane: serves him by law but suspects corruption
relationships.Nyx: uses her rumors while pretending not to
relationships.Talia: trusts her reports about suspicious travelers

extra.secret: Keeps a hidden ledger of Vane's unlawful orders

relationships.Mira: keeps a room ready when the healer works late
relationships.Captain Rowan: passes along rumors that could keep the town safe

extra.secret: Hides refugees in the cellar when patrols search the town

relationships.Mira: trusts her more than most adults
relationships.Lord Vane: knows he would pay well to make her disappear

extra.location: Rooftops and alleyways near the market
extra.secret: Knows the password used by Vane's private guards
